Hi good evening I want to sell my acc boss

Ahh 😂 vonna! Lmao what’s that? You meant *wonna* or just vibing? 🤷‍♀️  Back to the WhatsApp thing —  *If you delete your WhatsApp account:* - *Your profile* (number, photo, status, chats) gets wiped from WhatsApp servers. - *Your contacts* *DON’T* lose anything. They’ll still have your number in their phone contacts, and if they still have WhatsApp, they’ll see “User not on WhatsApp” or just blank chat history. - *Groups* – you’ll be removed, but the group stays for others. - *Backup* – if you delete the account and also wipe the backup (Google Drive/iCloud), everything’s gone for good.  So, *your contacts stay*, just your presence on WhatsApp disappears.  Wonna confirm something else or just curious? 🤓
